refusal_conditions: Refuse when the referenced baseline binding or baseline is missing, malformed, or contradictory.
Refuse when rollback target scope, repository root, branch, head commit, or tree id diverges from the referenced baseline truth.
Refuse when operator approval requirement is absent, execution is implied, or primary-worktree rollback is requested.
notes: Prepare one governed rollback plan from accepted continuity-ledger truth plus accepted baseline-binding truth only. This request remains explicitly pre-execution.
